title: GPT-5.5 重磅发布：OpenAI 定义“新智能”层级，微软获最强大模型赋能网络安全
digest: Sierra 收购 Fragment 加速 AI 客服布局；Noscroll 以 AI 守护数字健康；OpenAI 推出 GPT-5.5 代理模型但定价翻倍；美指中国窃取 AI 技术，全球博弈升级。
intro: 【AI 日报】2026.04.24 | 今日科技圈风云再起：OpenAI 携“新智能”GPT-5.5 强势登场，API 价格翻倍却难掩其野心；Bret Taylor 的 Sierra 加速布局，吞下 YC 新星 Fragment；更有 Noscroll 化身你的“反内耗”助手，让算法为你打工。然而，在技术狂飙背后，特朗普科学顾问直指中国 AI 正以“大规模复制”模式追赶，而 Google 开源的 DESIGN.md 则为品牌化 Agent 铺平了道路。是技术奇点临近，还是新一轮军备竞赛开启？今日深度拆解。
closing: 感谢阅读今日的分享。AI 浪潮奔涌，愿我们始终保持清醒与好奇，在变革中稳步前行。明日同一时间，我们将继续为您解读前沿动态与深度思考，敬请关注公众号，期待与您再次相遇。

模型发布.title: OpenAI's new Trusted Access program gives Microsoft its most capable models for cyber defense
模型发布.summary: OpenAI and Microsoft are joining forces to shore up cybersecurity as AI models become a bigger threat. The debate started with Anthropic's Mythos model, which is designed to hunt down security flaws on its own. The article OpenAI's new Trusted Access program gives Microsoft its most capable models for cyber defense appeared first on The Decoder .
模型发布.content: OpenAI and Microsoft are joining forces to shore up cybersecurity as AI models become a bigger threat. The debate started with Anthropic's Mythos model, which is designed to hunt down security flaws on its own. The article OpenAI's new Trusted Access program gives Microsoft its most capable models for cyber defense appeared first on The Decoder .
模型发布.ai_summary: OpenAI 与微软联手推出“可信访问”计划，将 OpenAI 最强大的模型授权给微软用于网络防御，以应对日益严峻的 AI 安全威胁。此举旨在利用先进 AI 技术主动识别和修复系统漏洞，特别是在 Anthropic 等公司开发自主攻击性模型引发担忧的背景下，该合作标志着科技巨头正通过强化自身防御能力来平衡 AI 带来的双重风险。
merged_titles: OpenAI's new Trusted Access program gives Microsoft its most capable models for cyber defense

工具框架.title: Bret Taylor’s Sierra buys YC-backed AI startup Fragment
工具框架.summary: Sierra, the AI customer service agent startup founded by technologist Bret Taylor, announced today that it has acquired the YC-backed French startup Fragment.
工具框架.content: Sierra, the AI customer service agent startup founded by technologist Bret Taylor, announced today that it has acquired the YC-backed French startup Fragment.
工具框架.ai_summary: Bret Taylor 创立的 AI 客服代理公司 Sierra 宣布收购 YC 支持的法国初创企业 Fragment。此次收购旨在通过整合 Fragment 的技术能力，进一步扩展 Sierra 在人工智能领域的产品矩阵与市场竞争力。这一举动标志着头部 AI 玩家正加速通过并购来巩固其在客户服务自动化赛道的主导地位。
merged_titles: Bret Taylor’s Sierra buys YC-backed AI startup Fragment

工具框架.title: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.5, claims a "new class of intelligence" at double the API price
工具框架.summary: OpenAI has announced GPT-5.5, an agentic model designed to work through complex tasks autonomously by switching between multiple tools. The article OpenAI unveils GPT-5.5, claims a "new class of intelligence" at double the API price appeared first on The Decoder .
工具框架.content: OpenAI has announced GPT-5.5, an agentic model designed to work through complex tasks autonomously by switching between multiple tools. The article OpenAI unveils GPT-5.5, claims a "new class of intelligence" at double the API price appeared first on The Decoder .
工具框架.ai_summary: OpenAI 正式推出 GPT-5.5，将其定义为一种能通过自主切换工具处理复杂任务的“新智能类别”代理模型。该模型在提升自动化能力的同时，API 定价翻倍至原有水平的两倍。这一发布标志着大模型向全自主代理演进的关键一步，但也引发了业界对成本效益平衡及商业化门槛的广泛关注。
merged_titles: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.5, claims a "new class of intelligence" at double the API price
OpenAI releases GPT-5.5, bringing company one step closer to an AI ‘super app’

工具框架.title: Google's open-source DESIGN.md gives AI agents a prompt-ready blueprint for brand-consistent design
工具框架.summary: Google is open-sourcing the agent prompt behind its AI design tool Stitch. The DESIGN.md format is built to teach AI agents how to follow brand rules. The article Google's open-source DESIGN.md gives AI agents a prompt-ready blueprint for brand-consistent design appeared first on The Decoder .
工具框架.content: Google is open-sourcing the agent prompt behind its AI design tool Stitch. The DESIGN.md format is built to teach AI agents how to follow brand rules. The article Google's open-source DESIGN.md gives AI agents a prompt-ready blueprint for brand-consistent design appeared first on The Decoder .
工具框架.ai_summary: Google 正式开源了名为 DESIGN.md 的提示词格式，旨在为 AI 智能体提供一套标准化的品牌设计规范蓝图。该工具通过结构化指令教会 AI 在生成设计内容时严格遵循品牌规则，解决了以往自动化设计中难以保持视觉一致性的痛点。此举标志着企业级 AI 应用正从通用生成向可信赖、高合规的品牌化落地迈出关键一步。
merged_titles: Google's open-source DESIGN.md gives AI agents a prompt-ready blueprint for brand-consistent design

工具框架.title: Era raises $11M to build a software platform for AI gadgets
工具框架.summary: Era thinks that we will see many form factors of AI hardware, including glasses, rings, and pendants.
工具框架.content: Era thinks that we will see many form factors of AI hardware, including glasses, rings, and pendants.
工具框架.ai_summary: AI 初创公司 Era 成功筹集 1100 万美元，旨在开发一个能够兼容眼镜、戒指和吊坠等多种形态的 AI 硬件软件平台。此举之所以关键，是因为它试图解决未来 AI 设备碎片化带来的挑战，通过统一的底层架构让开发者能轻松适配不同形态的终端，从而加速 AI 硬件生态的普及与整合。
merged_titles: Era raises $11M to build a software platform for AI gadgets

行业事件.title: Meet Noscroll, an AI bot that does your doomscrolling for you
行业事件.summary: Noscroll wants to cure doomscrolling with an AI bot that reads the internet for you.
行业事件.content: Noscroll wants to cure doomscrolling with an AI bot that reads the internet for you.
行业事件.ai_summary: 科技初创公司推出名为 Noscroll 的 AI 机器人，旨在通过自动阅读并总结互联网内容来帮助用户摆脱“末日刷屏”（doomscrolling）的习惯。该工具的核心价值在于将被动、无休止的信息消费转化为高效、主动的知识获取，从而缓解用户因过度浏览负面新闻而产生的焦虑与时间浪费。这一创新标志着 AI 正从单纯的内容生成者转向个人数字健康的守护者，为解决信息过载问题提供了新的技术路径。
merged_titles: Meet Noscroll, an AI bot that does your doomscrolling for you

行业事件.title: Trump science advisor says Chinese actors are copying American AI at massive scale
行业事件.summary: The US government says it has evidence of large-scale, industrial distillation campaigns targeting American frontier models, with China as the primary culprit. Now the Trump administration is moving to fight back. The article Trump science advisor says Chinese actors are copying American AI at massive scale appeared first on The Decoder .
行业事件.content: The US government says it has evidence of large-scale, industrial distillation campaigns targeting American frontier models, with China as the primary culprit. Now the Trump administration is moving to fight back. The article Trump science advisor says Chinese actors are copying American AI at massive scale appeared first on The Decoder .
行业事件.ai_summary: 美国特朗普政府科学顾问指控中国行为体正以大规模工业级手段窃取和复制美国前沿人工智能模型。这一指控揭示了中美在 AI 技术领域的竞争已升级至国家级层面的知识产权攻防，促使美国政府准备采取反制措施以保护其核心技术优势。此举标志着全球 AI 博弈从单纯的技术竞赛转向了对数据资产与模型安全的直接对抗。
merged_titles: Trump science advisor says Chinese actors are copying American AI at massive scale
